meta.source_note: Achievement data is focused on competition awards only. Bootcamps are handled in education.json, while internships are handled in professional.json.

title: Achievement Arena
description: Area untuk menampilkan penghargaan kompetisi dan pencapaian utama.

items.name: 3rd Winner - Mini Hackathon: Tech For Ummah
items.event: Mini Hackathon: Tech For Ummah, KI-PTKIN 2025
items.description: Won 3rd place through UsStuck, a web-based Islamic Q&A chatbot designed to help Gen Z users ask sensitive or socially uncomfortable questions about Islam in a private, non-judgmental interface.
items.problem: Some Gen Z users may feel hesitant to ask sensitive or socially uncomfortable questions about Islam directly, especially around topics such as tauhid and fiqh.
items.solution: UsStuck provides a more approachable digital interface for Islamic Q&A, reducing barriers to asking questions and supporting future learning through edutech.
highlights: Developed UsStuck as a web-based Islamic Q&A chatbot.
Focused on helping Gen Z users ask sensitive religious questions in a private and non-judgmental interface.
Positioned the project in the edutech and future learning category.
Won 3rd place at Mini Hackathon: Tech For Ummah, KI-PTKIN 2025.
